audience: Millennials 28-42, urban professionals, weekend baristas. Brooklyn/Mission/Shoreditch. Instagram-aesthetic, ritual-driven.
positioning: Single-origin micro-lots with traceable farms and slow-roast craftsmanship for the at-home connoisseur.
hooks: From cherry to cup in 14 days
The only bag with the farmer's GPS coordinates
Tastes like a Sunday morning in Antigua
We pay 3x fair-trade. Your cup tastes the difference.
